overall.description: A spaceship navigates through a dark nebula environment with massive asteroid formations and glowing teal mineral deposits. The cinematic game footage follows the vessel as it explores the alien space landscape, transitioning from open flight to close inspection of a massive hanging rock structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open nebula space with asteroid field

agents.ego_description: piloting a spaceship forward through the nebula, flying past a large asteroid with glowing teal mineral deposits on the left

entered.detail: boxy gray spacecraft with blue engine glow at the rear
massive rocky formation with jagged edges and scattered teal glowing deposits
clusters of bright cyan mineral veins embedded in the asteroid surface
diffuse teal and gray gas clouds filling the background
tall thin rock formations protruding from the main asteroid mass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a spaceship as it cruises through a dark nebula. The vessel moves steadily past a massive asteroid structure on the left, which features striking teal-glowing mineral deposits. The environment is vast and open, with diffuse nebula clouds providing atmospheric depth.

scene_state.functional_zone: cavernous asteroid interior with floating debris

events.description: spaceship exits frame right as camera pans left to reveal massive hanging rock formation with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: camera continues moving through the nebula, now focusing on a massive hanging rock formation with glowing crystals and floating debris field

entered.detail: enormous stalactite-like rock formation hanging from above with rough brown and gray texture
small rocks and asteroid fragments floating in zero gravity throughout the scene
bright cyan crystalline formations embedded in the hanging rock structure

segments.scene_description: As the spaceship exits the frame, the camera pans to reveal a massive hanging rock formation dominating the view. The perspective shifts to explore this cavernous space, highlighting glowing teal crystals embedded in the rock and scattered debris floating in the zero-gravity environment. The atmosphere remains dark and mysterious with the artificial teal lighting providing the primary illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark nebula that transitions from an open space flight into a close-up exploration of a massive celestial structure. It begins by trailing a spaceship as it cruises past a colossal asteroid adorned with striking teal-glowing mineral deposits amidst diffuse nebula clouds. As the vessel exits the frame, the camera pans away to reveal a dominating hanging rock formation that fills the view. The perspective then shifts to explore this cavernous space, moving deeper into the zero-gravity environment where floating debris and embedded teal crystals provide the primary illumination against the mysterious darkness.
